calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Schindler for Adam Wong.

Mr. Schindler stated that this is a missing person, that they are ready to proceed, that they have answered all of the issues, that they would like the Court to decide a date of death and that they have spent significant time searching for him. The Court asked about the requested date of April 15, 2011. Mr. Schindler replied that they are trying to pick a date that makes sense, that they had not had contact since before that date, that 20% is owned by the alleged decedent, that the real evidence is that they haven't seen him and that if he shows up they will give what is his back to him. The Court asked about 4517 3rd Street. Mr. Schindler stated that it is being rented, that it has been appraised 3 times, that it is not hugely valuable and that they need to probate. The Court asked what is at that location. Mr. Schindler stated that it used to be the Wong Meat Company but there were lease problems, that taxes are fine because it was not transferred, that they just need a date of death, that it has been more than 5 years, that they have been filing taxes for him and that they will do whatever the Court wants in regards to bond. The Petition for Letters of Administration was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not Reported)
